name: 15q26_2_NR2F2_SD
description: NR2F2 (COUP-TFII) at 15q26.2 flanked by small intra-chromosomal SDs (5-15 kb at 93-96% identity). Recurrent ~1-3 Mb 15q26.2 microdeletions are reported in congenital diaphragmatic hernia and complex heart defects (overlapping with 15q26 IGF1R region).

architecture.internal_structure: 5-15 kb SD pairs at 93-96% identity flanking NR2F2; embedded in the 15q26 distal SD shore.
